## Problem / use case

<!-- What are you trying to accomplish that's hard or impossible today? -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- What would the change look like? Sketches, snippets, or rough shapes are fine. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Workarounds, other approaches, or existing features that almost solve it. -->

## Scope check

This repo wires a handful of external projects together. If your request actually belongs upstream, it'll get a faster response there:

- [ ] Would require changes in `fccview/degoog` (UI, search backend, plugin system)
- [ ] Would require changes in SearXNG (engines, settings schema)
- [ ] Would require Cloudflare Tunnel / Access config (not code — may just be a doc update)
- [ ] Belongs in this repo (MCP server, compose wiring, plugin, scripts, docs)
